parts.label: PDK Transaxle Case
parts.function: The main alloy gear case housing the 7-speed PDK dual-clutch gear sets, shafts, and final drive.

parts.label: PDK Bellhousing / Transmission Case (Main)
parts.function: Aluminium alloy main structural case that encloses the entire PDK gear set and clutch assembly.

parts.label: PDK End Cover / Rear Cover
parts.function: Rear closing plate that seals the transmission case and provides bearing support at the tail end.

parts.label: PDK Oil Pan (Lower Sump)
parts.function: Lower sump that holds PDK-specific Pentosin FFL-2 fluid and houses the internal fluid filter. Removed for every fluid service.

parts.label: PDK Oil Pan (Alternate / Revised Sump)
parts.function: Revised-specification lower sump used on later production runs; check production date before ordering.

parts.label: PDK Housing Filler Neck
parts.function: Filler neck on the transmission case through which PDK fluid is added after a drain service.

parts.label: Clutch / Bell Housing
parts.function: The bell housing at the engine end that encloses the dual-clutch pack and mates to the engine.

parts.label: Engine Mounting Flange / Retaining Plate
parts.function: Bolt flange / retaining plate that secures the PDK bellhousing to the rear face of the engine block.

parts.label: Dual Wet Clutch Pack Assembly (K1 + K2)
parts.function: Concentric wet multi-plate clutch pair where K1 engages odd gears and K2 engages even gears. Replaced as part of mechatronic service.

parts.label: Clutch Actuation Cylinder (Electro-Hydraulic)
parts.function: Electro-hydraulic cylinder that applies and releases each clutch pack under TCU command during gear selection.

parts.label: Torsional Damper / Flex Plate Adapter
parts.function: Replaces the conventional flywheel and connects the engine crankshaft to the PDK input with torsional damping.

parts.label: Clutch Release Bearing
parts.function: Concentric slave cylinder-type release bearing that disengages the clutch pack on hydraulic command from the TCU.

parts.label: Input Shaft 1 (Inner, Odd Gears 1-3-5-7)
parts.function: Solid inner input shaft driven by K1 clutch that carries 1st, 3rd, 5th, and 7th gear drive gears. Not serviceable separately — references complete PDK unit.

parts.label: Input Shaft 2 (Outer, Even Gears 2-4-6-R)
parts.function: Hollow outer input shaft concentric with shaft 1, driven by K2 clutch, carrying 2nd, 4th, 6th, and reverse gears. Not serviceable separately.

parts.label: Output Shaft / Lay Shafts
parts.function: Lay shafts that receive torque from the input shafts via the selected gear set and deliver it to the final drive pinion.

parts.label: Gear Sets (1st through 7th + Reverse)
parts.function: Seven forward and one reverse helical-cut gear pairs providing the PDK ratio spread. Replaced with complete unit only.

parts.label: Synchronizer Rings and Hubs (x7)
parts.function: Blocker rings and hubs that match shaft speeds before dog engagement during pre-selected gear changes.

parts.label: Gear Selector Forks and Rods
parts.function: Electrohydraulically actuated selector forks that slide synchronizer sleeves to engage the pre-selected gear.

parts.label: PDK Hydraulic Control Unit / Valve Body
parts.function: Central valve body containing all shift solenoids and pressure regulators that direct fluid to clutches and selector actuators. Integral to the mechatronic unit.

parts.label: PDK Electro-Hydraulic Shift Solenoids
parts.function: Proportional solenoids within the HCU that modulate hydraulic pressure for clutch engagement and gear selection.

parts.label: PDK Mechatronic Connector Housing (B)
parts.function: Secondary wiring harness connector housing that interfaces the external loom to the mechatronic solenoid block.

parts.label: PDK Fluid Pump (Electric)
parts.function: Electric oil pump that maintains PDK system line pressure independently of engine speed, enabling stop-start and launch control.

parts.label: PDK Fluid Filter and Oil Strainer
parts.function: Filter assembly that removes particulate contamination from the PDK hydraulic fluid circuit. Replaced at every fluid change.

parts.label: PDK Fluid Temperature Sensor
parts.function: NTC sensor that monitors PDK fluid temperature so the TCU can adjust shift strategy and protect the clutch packs.

parts.label: PDK Fluid Heat Exchanger / Oil Cooler
parts.function: Water-to-oil heat exchanger that regulates PDK fluid temperature by exchanging heat with the engine coolant circuit.

parts.label: PDK Cooler Water Hose (Supply)
parts.function: Water supply hose from the engine cooling circuit to the PDK oil-to-water heat exchanger.

parts.label: PDK Cooler Water Hose (Return)
parts.function: Return water hose from the PDK heat exchanger back to the engine coolant circuit.

parts.label: PDK Cooler Oil Hose
parts.function: Transmission fluid hose linking the PDK oil circuit to the heat exchanger inlet/outlet.

parts.label: PDK Fluid Pressure Line
parts.function: High-pressure oil pipe from the PDK pump outlet to the hydraulic control unit / valve body.

parts.label: PDK Fluid Return Line
parts.function: Return line that routes low-pressure fluid from the valve body back to the PDK sump.

parts.label: PDK Vent / Vacuum Hose
parts.function: Breather hose that vents internal transmission pressure to prevent seal blow-out and oil leakage.

parts.label: PDK Moulded Coolant Hose
parts.function: Pre-formed rubber hose connecting the coolant circuit to the PDK heat exchanger with a specific routed shape to avoid hot surfaces.

parts.label: Final Drive / Differential Assembly
parts.function: The complete final-drive gear set and differential that splits torque to the two rear driveshafts at the PDK 3.889:1 final ratio.

parts.label: Hypoid Final Drive / Ring and Pinion
parts.function: 3.889:1 hypoid ring-and-pinion gear set stepping down gearbox output speed. Shaft oil seal adjacent to pinion preload bearing.

parts.label: Open Differential or LSD (Optional)
parts.function: Standard open differential (or optional torque-vectoring LSD) that distributes final drive torque between the rear wheels.

parts.label: Drive Flanges / Output Flanges (x2)
parts.function: Splined flanges bolted to each side of the differential that accept the rear driveshaft CV joints.

parts.label: Output Flange Left
parts.function: Left-side drive flange connecting the differential to the left rear half-shaft CV joint.

parts.label: Output Flange Right
parts.function: Right-side drive flange connecting the differential to the right rear half-shaft CV joint.

parts.label: Rear Driveshafts / Half-Shafts (x2)
parts.function: CV axles with tripod outer and ball-type inner joints transmitting final drive torque to each rear wheel hub.

parts.label: Output Shaft Oil Seal (Drive Flange Seal)
parts.function: Radial lip seal at each output flange preventing PDK fluid leakage where the driveshaft exits the differential housing. Replace at every driveshaft removal.

parts.label: PDK End Cover Seal Ring
parts.function: Sealing ring at the rear end cover interface that prevents fluid seepage between the housing and end plate.

parts.label: Input Shaft Oil Seal (External)
parts.function: External shaft oil seal at the bell housing face that prevents PDK fluid migrating toward the engine crankshaft seal.

parts.label: Input Shaft / Intermediate Shaft Seal Ring
parts.function: Internal sealing ring between the dual concentric input shafts preventing cross-leak between the two clutch oil circuits.

parts.label: PDK Oil Pan Gasket / Seal
parts.function: Sealing gasket between the lower oil pan and the main transmission case. Always replace when removing the sump.

parts.label: PDK End Cap O-Ring
parts.function: O-ring sealing the rear end cap to the transmission case, preventing fluid loss at the gearbox tail.

parts.label: PDK Sump Torx Bolt (x8)
parts.function: Torx-head bolt securing the PDK oil pan to the transmission case. Single-use — replace on every sump removal.

parts.label: Fluid Drain Plug
parts.function: Bottom plug removed to drain PDK fluid. Uses a fibre sealing washer — replace washer at every service.

parts.label: Drain Plug Sealing Washer
parts.function: Crush-type aluminium or fibre sealing washer under the PDK drain plug. Single-use — must be replaced every time the drain plug is removed.

parts.label: Fluid Fill / Level Plug
parts.function: Side plug used to set the PDK fluid level when refilling. Fill until fluid dribbles from this port with gearbox at operating temperature.

parts.label: PDK Transmission Fluid (Pentosin FFL-3)
parts.function: Factory-specified PDK fluid (approx. 7.2 L fill). Do not substitute with standard ATF — incorrect fluid destroys the wet clutch packs.

parts.label: Selector / Mechatronic Housing
parts.function: Houses the gear-selection mechanism and shift control linkage integrated into the top of the PDK case.

parts.label: Mechatronic Control Unit (Valve Body + TCU)
parts.function: Combined hydraulic/electronic module that actuates clutches and gear shifts. Major service item — Porsche refurbish programme available.

parts.label: Gear Selector Shaft
parts.function: Internal selector shaft translating gear lever / mechatronic commands into mechanical engagement of the synchronizer forks.

parts.label: PDK TCU / Transmission Control Module
parts.function: Bosch TCU managing all PDK shift logic, clutch pressure, and driver-mode strategies via CAN bus with the DME.

parts.label: PDK Gear Selector Unit (Cabin)
parts.function: Centre-console push-button selector providing D/R/N/P positions plus Sport and Sport+ mode input to the TCU.

parts.label: PDK Steering Wheel Shift Paddles
parts.function: Column-fixed paddles that send manual upshift and downshift requests to the TCU for driver-initiated gear changes.

parts.label: PDK Rotational Speed Sensors (Input + Output)
parts.function: Hall-effect sensors on input and output shafts providing real-time speed data for clutch slip and shift-point control.

parts.label: Transaxle Rear Mount (Hydro-Mount)
parts.function: Rear rubber hydro-mount supporting the gearbox tail and isolating driveline vibration from the chassis.

parts.label: Transaxle Mount Console / Bracket
parts.function: Structural console bolting the hydro-mount to the chassis subframe, carrying transaxle vertical and lateral loads.

parts.label: Drive Flange Snap Ring / Retaining Circlip
parts.function: Circlip retaining the output drive flange axially within the differential bearing carrier.

parts.label: Differential Bearing Bush
parts.function: Bronze bearing bush in the differential carrier supporting the drive flange and absorbing radial loads from the half-shaft.
